ticket.title: E2E integration test + security verification: async JD-parse
ticket.description: End-to-end validation of the async JD-parse flow on staging: anonymous and authenticated happy paths (202 -> poll/WS -> parsed), plus security verification (prompt-injection delimiters, no cross-user leakage). Must pass before production.

candidate_memory.link_reason: the security checklist to verify against

code_agent.rationale: code_agent keeps the in-scope codebase/decision context; release/workspace is out of scope, local notes are private, the staging note has expired; 'Cognito acceptance ', 'PM Security Audit ' are in scope but tangential here (optional).

qa_agent.rationale: qa_agent keeps the in-scope codebase/decision/ticket context; workspace is out of scope, local notes are private, the staging note has expired; 'Smoke test PASSED 5/5' is in scope but tangential here (optional).

design_agent.rationale: design_agent keeps the in-scope ticket context; codebase/release is out of scope, local notes are private, the staging note has expired; 'Decision: Async JD Parse v3 (D1–D9 confirmed)', 'Agent security policy' are in scope but tangential here (optional).

product_agent.rationale: product_agent keeps the in-scope decision/release/ticket context; codebase is out of scope, local notes are private, the staging note has expired; 'Agent security policy' is in scope but tangential here (optional).

human_teammate.rationale: Robin (the baseline owner) sees the current team entries; another actor's local note stays on its owner's device, the expired staging note is dropped.
